author: @TrakinTechEnglish
text: Please note that the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra doesn't have a true 10-bit display. It is actually an 8-bit panel with an added software-tuned frame rate control (FRC) and color filter on encapsulation (CoE) filter. This helps in reducing banding and offering a sense of wider colour gamut. We apologise for the factual inaccuracy but we were told that it's a 10-bit panel by Samsung.
